entries.title: Quarkus
entries.description: Supersonic subatomic Java framework used for the People REST API.

entries.title: React
entries.description: Frontend UI for the People CRUD workshop application.

entries.title: PostgreSQL
entries.description: Relational database backing the People Service.

entries.title: OpenShift
entries.description: Container platform hosting the workshop workloads.

entries.title: Keycloak
entries.description: OIDC provider securing the People API and Developer Hub.

entries.title: Argo CD
entries.description: GitOps continuous delivery for the People Service manifests.

entries.title: Red Hat Developer Hub
entries.description: Internal developer portal with catalog, templates, and Kubernetes views.

entries.title: OpenAPI
entries.description: Machine-readable API contracts published from the People backend.

entries.title: Testcontainers
entries.description: Candidate for integration testing PostgreSQL dependencies locally.

rings.name: ADOPT
rings.description: Technologies we use and recommend for the workshop.

rings.name: TRIAL
rings.description: Worth pursuing with a clear goal and limited scope.

rings.name: ASSESS
rings.description: Worth exploring to understand impact on the platform.

rings.name: HOLD
rings.description: Proceed with caution or avoid for new work.
